_comment: Model-cards de los pesos de nodos neuronales de mmorch. Cada peso: arch, dims, sha256 (verificado al cargar), dataset+metrica, fecha, regen_cmd. Promover una version nueva = debe BATIR la metrica del incumbente (gate flywheel).

code_embedder.trained_on: logs/codequality_dataset.jsonl (10847 funcs, 9 repos) -> radon MI tier
code_embedder.metric: radon-tier AUC 0.88 (vs bge-small 0.80) — BATE al incumbente
code_embedder.regen_cmd: MSYS2_ARG_CONV_EXCL='*' wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'export MMORCH_DS=/mnt/c/Users/map12/.claude/orchestration/logs/radon_dataset.jsonl; ~/flywheel/bin/python /mnt/c/.../flywheel/simclr.py 0 16 192' && python flywheel/export_numpy.py
